name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-legallens
title: LegalLens SPFx Solution
shortDescription: AI-powered contract management and e-signature platform built on SharePoint Online. Includes an SPFx web part for internal users and a vendor-facing signing flow backed by Azure Functions — no SharePoint access required for external signers.
longDescription: AI-powered contract management and e-signature platform built on SharePoint Online. Includes an SPFx web part for internal users and a vendor-facing signing flow backed by Azure Functions — no SharePoint access required for external signers.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
